projects.name: MENA to the Valley 2026
projects.company_brief: Sprintly Partners' flagship program connecting MENA/Africa founders with Silicon Valley investors, mentors, and corporate partners through a structured 3-phase journey: regional selection, virtual bootcamp, and 7-10 day Silicon Valley immersion.
next_actions: Review and shortlist from 23 applications
Confirm mentor assignments from AI Squad
Finalize virtual session schedule for May
Book SV immersion venues and corporate visits
possible_intros: Tarek Taha (CBE Fintech Hub) for fintech founders
Sara Rona (SVB) for US banking setup

projects.name: Monshaat Partnership
projects.company_brief: The General Authority for Small and Medium Enterprises (Monshaat) is the Saudi government body responsible for SME development. Chaired by Dr. Majid bin Abdullah Alqasabi (Minister of Commerce). Governor: Sami Ibrahim Alhussaini. Monshaat promotes entrepreneurship, provides funding, and runs accelerator programs across Saudi Arabia.
next_actions: Receive startup nominations from Monshaat
Evaluate nominated startups against program criteria
Propose MENA to the Valley showcase at LEAP 2026 (Aug)
possible_intros: Khalid Al-Murshed (Return On Health, Saudi healthtech founder)
projects.notes: Contract value: confidential. Payment: 50% on signature, 50% before program start.

projects.name: HBKU Partnership
projects.company_brief: Hamad Bin Khalifa University (HBKU) is a member of Qatar Foundation. Their Innovation Center incubates deep-tech startups spun out of HBKU research. The partnership focuses on accelerating 2 HBKU spinout startups through the MENA to the Valley program.

timeline.milestone: Nada updating on timeline this week

next_actions: Follow up with Nada Al-Balam for timeline update (promised this week)
Finalize contract terms
Onboard QASR Technologies and CircleProcess
possible_intros: Khalid Al-Murshed (Saudi healthtech, potential cross-Gulf connection)
projects.notes: QASR Technologies: AI for oil & gas (signed deal with Shell). CircleProcess: LNG-to-hydrogen conversion (won Qatar grant, partnered with Milaha and ABS).

startups.name: QASR Technologies
startups.description: Deep-tech AI for reservoir analysis in oil & gas. HBKU spinout. Signed 12-month AI deal with Shell Qatar.

startups.name: CircleProcess Technologies
startups.description: LNG-to-hydrogen onboard conversion. HBKU spinout. Won Qatar grant for ReformLNG project. Partners: Milaha, ABS, QSTP.

projects.name: ARPU Plus / CloudCom
projects.company_brief: ARPU Plus is a telecoms value-added services company under A15, one of Egypt's largest digital holding companies. Sprintly provides BD and US market expansion support for ARPU Plus portfolio companies, starting with CloudCom (cloud communications). Medhat Karam is CEO of ARPU Plus.

timeline.milestone: First partnership introductions to US tech companies

next_actions: Deliver first partnership introductions to US tech targets (Meta, Microsoft, Google)
CloudCom meeting scheduled Wednesday 6 PM
Prepare partnership positioning deck for US targets
projects.notes: Retainer model. Revenue share on partnerships introduced.

projects.name: Algeria Ventures
projects.company_brief: Algeria Ventures is at the heart of Algeria's entrepreneurial ecosystem, helping startups grow, scale, and succeed. They run cohort-based programs. Sprintly guides quarterly founder cohorts from Algeria through intensive Silicon Valley mentorship programs.
next_actions: Confirm next cohort dates
Identify Algerian founders for MENA to the Valley crossover

projects.name: AI Squad
projects.company_brief: Sprintly's 6-month executive AI enablement program. Corporate innovation support from AI experts at NVIDIA, OpenAI, Scale AI, Dropbox, Salesforce. 4 sprints: Discovery, Strategic Blueprinting, Implementation, Scaling. Includes optional Silicon Valley immersion. NVIDIA podcast produced at Grand Egyptian Museum.

timeline.milestone: NVIDIA podcast at Grand Egyptian Museum

next_actions: Identify 5 target companies for AI Squad
Create outreach campaign for corporate AI transformation
Leverage NVIDIA podcast content for lead generation
possible_intros: Jayakarthikeyan G. (MADON, CIO & Head of AI)
Hazem Safwat (Director of AI, confidential org)
projects.notes: WEAKEST GOAL. Zero paying clients. Content exists but no pipeline. Needs urgent attention.

projects.name: CloudCon Diligence
projects.company_brief: CloudCon is under evaluation for potential partnership. Sprintly is conducting due diligence on leadership, legal entity, customer proof, and US positioning. Research and insider-only diligence questions have been prepared.

timeline.milestone: Validation: leadership, legal entity, customer proof

next_actions: Send refined diligence questions to CloudCon team
Verify legal entity and US incorporation
Validate customer references
